title: Further education and skills: March 2025
body: "These further education and skills statistics for England cover the 2024 to 2025 academic year reported to date, August 2024 to January 2025.  They include government-funded further education for adults, aged 19 and over. This covers:   adult further education and skills summary statistics education and training summary statistics essential skills tailored learning and non-regulated provision learner participation and achievements   This excludes schools and higher education.  Also released are official statistics for achievement rates covering the 2023 to 2024 academic year.  Headline further education figures include apprenticeships where appropriate. A separate Apprenticeships: March 2025 statistics publication provides more information on apprenticeships. "
